def negative_metric_name_contains_dynamic_user_or_data_values():
    rule_id = "metric_name_contains_dynamic_user_or_data_values"
    family = "observability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag dynamic metric names that explode the series count."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
